what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links a board item (board://item-1f9946c1) to the dragnet-development channel as a board_items attachment, with an added timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It has an id att-967e0f76, channel dragnet-development, attachment_type board_items, and target board://item-1f9946c1.
There are no code symbols present.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-1f9946c1.
The attachment_type is board_items, indicating a board-item-to-channel link.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Represents targets with a board:// URI scheme.
Uses an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp with offset for the added field.
notes: A timestamped channel attachment record that points a board item into the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or relationship is represented by board://item-1f9946c1?

purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose of recording a channel-to-board-item attachment matches the content; it is purely a reference metadata record.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a persistent, discoverable association between a board item and a channel conversation or thread.
contribution: Provides a dated, typed pointer from a channel to a board item, enabling traceability between channel memory and board artifacts.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file that records a board_items link from the dragnet-development channel to board://item-1f9946c1 with an added timestamp.
